completed.title: Build the core vehicle cost calculator for fuel, maintenance, tires, depreciation, and annual ownership costs
Add annual ownership costs like insurance, registration, parking, inspection, and roadside assistance
Convert the calculator into the PersonalStaticWebsite side project and TypeScript structure
Add responsive layout support and mobile-friendly adjustments
Add true-cost pie chart breakdown with linked hover states and tooltips
Extract the cost breakdown viewer into its own reusable component
Add trip and recurring modal expansion flows using the shared breakdown component
Add local persistence, saved state restore, and custom vehicle support
Add starter templates and custom vehicle entry workflow
Add include / exclude controls for depreciation and annual ownership costs
Add fuel-type-aware calculations and current fuel price loading
Add one-way / round-trip trip planning toggle
Add benchmark insight cards with learn-more modals and source references
Move insights to metadata-driven JSON with category-based filtering for related modals
Add a small true-cost-per-mile pill to the sticky header
Fix custom-vehicle validation feedback and mobile placeholder styling
Review and tighten labels across the page for clarity and consistency
Support financed vehicles with APR, down payment, term or payment modes, and payoff math
Add overall ownership estimate, financing summaries, and loan payoff drill-downs
Add major-version-aware saved state handling so users are notified when data is outdated and it can be migrated or cleared safely
Add share support by generating a URL with serialized state
Add structured year / make / model / trim lookup with EPA fuel economy prefill

backlog.title: Add a help section explaining how local state, shared links, and saved data are managed
Add support for maintaining a personal garage of up to 3 vehicles with vehicle-specific annual miles and ownership assumptions
Treat shared links as temporary imports so users can view, compare, or save them without overwriting their personal garage or workspace
Add comparison mode for evaluating multiple vehicles side by side
Add fleet-style annual ownership summaries across saved vehicles
Add maintenance warnings for likely high-mileage vehicles and rising upkeep costs over time
Set more default cost categories from fetched vehicle class data when a reliable source is available
Support multiple unit systems, including metric
Add a guided step-by-step experience similar to a tax-prep flow using modal-based prompts
Support other ownership types such as rental and lease
Add vehicle imagery for selected trims when a reliable source is available
Add internationalization for English, Spanish, and French across North and South American audiences
